completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created in-progress bug packet for SCN-002-032 digest Telegram delivery tracking. No source, test, parent artifact, or certification-owned fields modified.

scopeProgress.name: Restore Telegram digest delivery tracking proof

executionHistory.summary: Packetized uncovered broad E2E blocker for the spec 002 digest Telegram delivery scenario.

Implemented digest Telegram delivery tracking fix. Telegram SendDigest now returns send errors and rejects no-op success when no proactive chat is configured; digest generator can MarkDelivered by stored digest id; scheduler delivers digest text then marks delivered and keeps retry state on send/mark failure; test_digest_telegram.sh now preserves the tracked digest identity on digest_date conflict and rejects a generation-only control row. Evidence: ./smackerel.sh check exit 0, ./smackerel.sh test unit exit 0, focused test_digest.sh + test_digest_telegram.sh exit 0, broad ./smackerel.sh test e2e exit 1 but SCN-002-032 passed; latest broad summary was 33 passed, 1 failed on test_topic_lifecycle.sh outside BUG-002-004. Certification fields intentionally left in_progress for bubbles.validate.

failures.summary: test_digest_telegram.sh SCN-002-032 digest delivery not tracked.

statusDiscipline.scopePickupRule: Single bug scope; owner starts with targeted red-stage proof before edits.
statusDiscipline.specDoneRequires: bubbles.validate certification after targeted and broader E2E evidence.
